zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de la Vache於1397年出生在英國賀福爾洛--也時，她的父親Philip DeLaVache26歲，母親Mrs Philip DeLaVache27歲。她於大約1409年與Richard Grey在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1452年1月16日在英國賀福爾賀福德享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche de la Vache于1397年出生在英国賀福爾洛--也时，她的父亲Philip DeLaVache26岁，母亲Mrs Philip DeLaVache27岁。她于大约1409年与Richard Grey在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1452年1月16日在英国賀福爾賀福德享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vache
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Amedee, Euclide, Josee, Laurent, Lucien, Yvon.  German Gerhard, Friedrich Wilhelm, Hans Diedrich.  Spanish Altagracia, Jorge, Mario, Pedro.

French (mainly northern; Haché): probably a variant of Aché (influenced by the name in 2 below), which is from the ancient Germanic personal name Achari composed of the elements ac ‘blade’ and hari ‘army’. In North America, however, the name Haché may have been an altered form of French Larché (see Larche 2). Compare Achey , Ashey , and Hachey .
In some cases possibly also French (mainly northern) and Walloon: from Old French hache ‘axe, battleaxe’, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who made or used axes or battleaxes.

variants.name: Hachey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Celina, Emile, Fernande, Napoleon, Placide, Romain.
Altered form of French or French Canadian Haché (see Hache 1). Compare Achey .
History: Bearers of the surname Hachey trace their origin to Michel Haché dit Gallant from QC (see Hache ).

variants.name: Ashey
meanings: Americanized form of French or French Canadian Haché (see Hache 1) or of its altered form Hachey . Compare Achey .
History: Bearers of the surname Ashey mostly trace their origin to Michel Haché dit Gallant from QC (see Hache ).

variants.name: Achey
meanings: Americanized form of French or French Canadian Haché (see Hache 1) or of its altered form Hachey . Compare Achee and Ashey .
History: Bearers of the surname Achey trace their origin to Michel Haché dit Gallant from QC (see Hache ).

variants.name: Larche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Herve, Lucien.

Shortened form of French Larchevêque: from archevêque ‘archbishop’, with fused definite article l', either denoting a member of an archbishop's household or used as an ironic nickname. This surname is also found among African Americans. Compare Larsh 1.
In some cases probably also French (Larché): regional variant of Larcher ‘the bowman’. Compare Hache 1.

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de la Vache was born in 1397, in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, her father, Philip DeLaVache, was 26 and her mother, Mrs Philip DeLaVache, was 27. She married Richard Grey about 1409, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 16 January 1452, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 55.

Elle a épousé Richard Grey environ 1409, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1452, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de la Vache(이)가 1397년 영국 허퍼드실르 로스--w예에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip DeLaVache(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Philip DeLaVache(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Richard Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1452년 1월 16일 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de la Vache родилась в 1397 г. в местности росс-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip DeLaVache было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Philip DeLaVache, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Grey около 1409 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 16 января 1452 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.
